title: Pasupatiswarar Temple
tagline: Pasupatiswarar Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Pasupatiswarar Temple is located in Pandanallur in the Thiruvidaimarudur taluk of Thanjavur district in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu.
overview.description: Pasupatiswarar Temple is located in Pandanallur in the Thiruvidaimarudur taluk of Thanjavur district in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Shiva is worshiped as Pasupatheeswarar, and is represented by the lingam and his consort Parvati is depicted as Mangalambika. The presiding deity is revered in the 7th century Tamil Saiva canonical work, the Tevaram, written by Tamil poet saints known as the nayanars and classified as Paadal Petra Sthalam. topPlaces.name: Pandanallur
topPlaces.description: Pandanallur is an Indian village located in the Thiruvidaimarudur taluk of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu. It is north of the town of Aduthurai, not far from the city of Mayiladuthurai.

topPlaces.name: Alangudi, Mayiladuthurai
topPlaces.description: Alangudi is a village in the Mayiladuthurai taluk of Mayiladuthurai district, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Kuthalam block
topPlaces.description: Kuthalam block is a revenue block in the Kuthalam taluk of Mayiladuthurai district, Tamil Nadu, India. There are a total of 51 panchayat villages in this block.

topPlaces.name: Kuthalam taluk
topPlaces.description: Kuthalam taluk is a taluk in the Mayiladuthurai District in the state of Tamil Nadu, India. The administrative headquarters is the town of Kuthalam.

topPlaces.name: Kuthalam
topPlaces.description: Kuthalam (also known as Tiruthuruthi) is a panchayat town and Taluk in Mayiladuthurai district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The language being spoken is Tamil.

topPlaces.name: Thiruppanandal
topPlaces.description: Thiruppanandal is a panchayat town in Thanjavur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Agniswarar Temple, Kanjanur
topPlaces.description: The Agniswarar Temple (கஞ்சனூர் அக்கினீஸ்வரர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple in the village of Kanjanur, 18 kilometres north-east of Kumbakonam. The presiding deity is Sukra (Venus).

topPlaces.name: Kalyanasundareswarar Temple, Thiruvelvikudi
topPlaces.description: Kalyanasundareswarar Temple is a Hindu temple located at Thiruvelvikudi in the Kuthalam taluk of Mayiladuthurai district of Tamil Nadu, India. It is dedicated to Shiva.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Pasupatiswarar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Pasupatiswarar Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Pasupatiswarar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (96 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (97 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Pasupatiswarar Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Pasupatiswarar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Pasupatiswarar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Pasupatiswarar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Pasupatiswarar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Pandanallur, Alangudi, Mayiladuthurai, Kuthalam block, Kuthalam taluk, Kuthalam.
